rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify financial projections with actual data.

description.short: Calculate equity dilution percentage for existing shareholders.
description.long: Calculate equity dilution percentage for existing shareholders.

short_i18n.en: Calculate equity dilution percentage for existing shareholders.
short_i18n.tr: Mevcut hissedarlarin mulkiyet Ratioindaki azalmayi (sulandirma) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den Verwässerungsprozentsatz des Eigenkapitals fur bestehende Aktionäre.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le pourcentage de dilution des capitaux propres pour les actionnaires existants.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el porcentaje de dilución del capital para los accionistas existentes.
short_i18n.ar: حساب نسبة تخفيف حقوق المساهمين الحاليين.
